evidence: Methods: "Feature importance was calculated...finally 20 genes with the highest Gini importance were selected within each cluster (Fig. S6)." Table 2 presents top genes by Gini importance. However, main substantive conclusions about pathotypes in clusters (e.g., "A-A includes 86% of all STEC strains") are based on actual frequency distributions shown in Figs. 2b and S3, not importance magnitudes.
